## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Yourco and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, website migration, and team structure changes.](https://fathom.video/share/YyVYHbBLgD8qQzSzdxJ6z7W4TizGrsYy?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX introducing pod team structure; Andrej Vidovic joining as pod lead for Yourco account](https://fathom.video/share/YyVYHbBLgD8qQzSzdxJ6z7W4TizGrsYy?tab=summary&timestamp=33.0)
  - [5 new articles ready by end of day; Jessica adding prompts to company brief for more accurate content](https://fathom.video/share/YyVYHbBLgD8qQzSzdxJ6z7W4TizGrsYy?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [Website migration in progress; discussion on SEO best practices and rich snippets](https://fathom.video/share/YyVYHbBLgD8qQzSzdxJ6z7W4TizGrsYy?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Shift in content strategy: 50% broad educational, 50% high-intent ICP-focused topics](https://fathom.video/share/YyVYHbBLgD8qQzSzdxJ6z7W4TizGrsYy?tab=summary&timestamp=1006.0)

## Topics

### Team Structure Changes

  - [GrowthX moving to pod team structure for better collaboration and consistency](https://fathom.video/share/YyVYHbBLgD8qQzSzdxJ6z7W4TizGrsYy?tab=summary&timestamp=33.0)
  - [Andrej Vidovic introduced as new pod lead for Yourco account](https://fathom.video/share/YyVYHbBLgD8qQzSzdxJ6z7W4TizGrsYy?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
  - [2-3 additional team members to join pod over time](https://fathom.video/share/YyVYHbBLgD8qQzSzdxJ6z7W4TizGrsYy?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)
  - [Kyle to remain involved, focusing on client operations and processes](https://fathom.video/share/YyVYHbBLgD8qQzSzdxJ6z7W4TizGrsYy?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)

### Content Progress and Strategy

  - [5 new articles ready by end of day](https://fathom.video/share/YyVYHbBLgD8qQzSzdxJ6z7W4TizGrsYy?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [Jessica updating company brief with new prompts (e.g., non-desk environments, multiple location management)](https://fathom.video/share/YyVYHbBLgD8qQzSzdxJ6z7W4TizGrsYy?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [7 previously reviewed articles approved for publication](https://fathom.video/share/YyVYHbBLgD8qQzSzdxJ6z7W4TizGrsYy?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
  - [Holding off on posting until website migration complete](https://fathom.video/share/YyVYHbBLgD8qQzSzdxJ6z7W4TizGrsYy?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [New content strategy: 50% broad educational content, 50% high-intent ICP-focused topics](https://fathom.video/share/YyVYHbBLgD8qQzSzdxJ6z7W4TizGrsYy?tab=summary&timestamp=1006.0)
  - [High-intent focus areas: translations, multi-language workforce management, personal cell phone use for communication](https://fathom.video/share/YyVYHbBLgD8qQzSzdxJ6z7W4TizGrsYy?tab=summary&timestamp=1028.0)

### Website Migration

  - [Metadata, URL structure, and internal links being maintained](https://fathom.video/share/YyVYHbBLgD8qQzSzdxJ6z7W4TizGrsYy?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Open graph metadata and microdata from WordPress (Yoast) being transferred](https://fathom.video/share/YyVYHbBLgD8qQzSzdxJ6z7W4TizGrsYy?tab=summary&timestamp=630.0)
  - [Discussion on SEO best practices: canonical tags, site maps, Web Vitals](https://fathom.video/share/YyVYHbBLgD8qQzSzdxJ6z7W4TizGrsYy?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
  - [Offer for GrowthX's technical SEO team to review migration](https://fathom.video/share/YyVYHbBLgD8qQzSzdxJ6z7W4TizGrsYy?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

### SEO and Rich Snippets

  - [Rich snippets influenced by search volume, topical relevance, and content structure](https://fathom.video/share/YyVYHbBLgD8qQzSzdxJ6z7W4TizGrsYy?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
  - [Placement of content in top 25-30% of page important for rich snippet selection](https://fathom.video/share/YyVYHbBLgD8qQzSzdxJ6z7W4TizGrsYy?tab=summary&timestamp=851.0)
  - [Changes in rich snippet display since AI overview introduction](https://fathom.video/share/YyVYHbBLgD8qQzSzdxJ6z7W4TizGrsYy?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)

### Content Publishing Strategy

  - [Recommendation to stagger content publication post-migration rather than bulk posting](https://fathom.video/share/YyVYHbBLgD8qQzSzdxJ6z7W4TizGrsYy?tab=summary&timestamp=1225.0)
  - [Need to prioritize content for sequential release](https://fathom.video/share/YyVYHbBLgD8qQzSzdxJ6z7W4TizGrsYy?tab=summary&timestamp=1277.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to share new articles for review next week](https://fathom.video/share/YyVYHbBLgD8qQzSzdxJ6z7W4TizGrsYy?tab=summary&timestamp=1300.0)
  - [Increase pace of content review to prepare for website launch](https://fathom.video/share/YyVYHbBLgD8qQzSzdxJ6z7W4TizGrsYy?tab=summary&timestamp=1307.0)
  - [Develop posting schedule for new content post-migration](https://fathom.video/share/YyVYHbBLgD8qQzSzdxJ6z7W4TizGrsYy?tab=summary&timestamp=1225.0)
  - [GrowthX to offer technical SEO review of migrated pages if needed](https://fathom.video/share/YyVYHbBLgD8qQzSzdxJ6z7W4TizGrsYy?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Focus on creating high-intent, ICP-focused content for next 2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/YyVYHbBLgD8qQzSzdxJ6z7W4TizGrsYy?tab=summary&timestamp=1006.0)
  - [Prepare for holiday break (2 weeks off after next week's meeting)](https://fathom.video/share/YyVYHbBLgD8qQzSzdxJ6z7W4TizGrsYy?tab=summary&timestamp=966.0)
